notes:
{"notes":"

What's new

  • Search within specific spaces — type @ to select spaces, then search only within them.
  • Selected spaces appear as compact chips in the search bar with keyboard navigation support.
  • Backspace at the start of the search input removes the last selected space.
  • Fixed search becoming unresponsive while indexing is in progress.
  • Fixed file name search not finding files with special characters (e.g. ö, ä, ü, õ).

Thank you for the continued support and feedback!

"}
